extract: Typhlosion (Japanese: バクフーン Bakphoon) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Quilava starting at level 36. It is the final form of Cyndaquil. In Hisui, Typhlosion has a dual-type Fire/Ghost regional form. It evolves from Quilava starting at level 36. It is the final form of Cyndaquil in the Hisui region.
